db_pool_reset._comment: Auto-resets the control_plane connection pool on exhaustion. Rate-limited 1/30min internally. Dominant production error (~51% of volume); enabling this is the biggest single win.

apscheduler_overrun_alert._comment: Tracks job overruns; alerts after 3 in 24h per job.

numeric_overflow_widen_cr._comment: Files a change-request with a proposed schema-widening migration. Operator must fill in TABLE/COLUMN.

cost_mode_undefined_alert._comment: NameError in self_improvement_crew. Surfaces to Signal once per 24h until fixed.

cost_mode_undefined_alert_v1._comment: Same as above for the evolution crew.

anthropic_str_content_cr._comment: Files a change-request with a defensive coerce_response() helper module. Operator wires it into the call path after approving.

self_heal_router._comment: Catch-all multi-router for variant-heavy patterns: model-misroute (B), no-function-calling (H), missing-column (F — now CR-gated).

log_only._comment: Fallback handler — only fires if the multi-router is disabled or fails to claim an anomaly.
